Legal & Policies

Delete My Data

You have the right to ask us to delete the personal information you submitted through our website. Use the form below to send a verified request, and we'll take care of it.

Last updated: June 16, 2026

You can request that we delete the personal information you submitted through our website forms. We'll process verified requests within 30 days and email you to confirm once it's done. For more on how we handle your information, see our Privacy Policy and our Data Use & Protection page.

What gets deleted

A deletion request covers the personal information you sent us through this website, which may include:

  • Contact-form submissions: your name, phone number, and email address.
  • Estimate-request submissions: your name, phone, email, property address, and the project details you described.

Please note we may need to retain some records to meet legal, tax, warranty, or contractual obligations — for example, records tied to a completed project or an active warranty. Where that applies, we'll delete everything we're not required to keep and let you know what was retained and why.

Request deletion

Prefer to reach us directly?

Contact Neff Paving

You can also email or call us with your deletion request and we'll handle it the same way.
